hero.subtitle: An immortal. A city of steam & shadows. A debt come due.

heroImage.alt: The Newport Maeve Chronicles cover illustration

about.label: The Series
paragraphs: The Newport Maeve Chronicles is a gothic noir fantasy series set in Elyssar, a world where vampires, angels, and demonic forces exist alongside a society of steam and ruthless progress.

Now old, dark forces are seeking vengeance and a thin crack to crawl through. They have adapted to the modern world and its refining, and, no longer content with flesh alone, they thrive on the extended boundaries of sin and grief.

The more a society perfects itself, the more elaborate its sins and sorrows grow — and on that very refinement, they feed. The demonic, unseen, slowly consumes the city, threatening to break the Confederacy itself.
Unless someone does something… unless someone acts as a last-line contingency.

image.alt: The Ironclad Consortium tower in Newport Maeve

prequal.label: The Audiobook
prequal.lead: The official prequel to the Newport Maeve Chronicles. Nine chapters. One immortal. A city that does not yet know what is coming.

characters.label: The Cast
characters.title: Characters of Newport Maeve
characters.lead: Immortals and orphans. Angels and enforcers. In Newport Maeve, everyone is something other than what they appear.
characters.footnoteText: Hover to reveal. More on the

quotes.text: “You presume the One True is asking.”

“Because it is the pinnacle, your crowning monument to progress. The most technologically advanced city of your age. Where ambition walks hand in hand with hubris. And progress breeds corruption. Corruption blossoms into indulgence. And indulgence sharpens hunger into obsession, polishes desire until it gleams. The hellspawn, Dion… they do not feed on blood or flesh. They feed on that refinement, on cravings shaped by civilization itself.”

“Listen, Protector. It will not happen. I have a strict protocol for who can be what in my society. If you find otherwise, you can seek me out again—and then we can have any kind of conversation you wish.”

city.label: The World
city.title: Newport Maeve
city.lead: Where the Zarina River meets the Moon Sea. The Confederacy's crown jewel and monument of its technological and logistic progress.

city.imageAlt: Illustrated map of Newport Maeve, where the Zarina River meets the Moon Sea

author.label: The Author
author.title: Dean Jordanov
author.imageAlt: Dean Jordanov, creator of The Newport Maeve Chronicles
author.description: Blue collar from Eastern Europe gone world-builder. One-man army handling all writing, illustrations and technical aspects with a lot of human power and various AI-assistance tools. All ideas, characters, settings, stories, twists and turns came from somewhere else entirely: from decades of living, working, and paying attention.

contacts.label: Follow the Chronicles
contacts.title: Join the World
contacts.lead: The story is growing. Follow production updates, explore the lore, and see the world take shape.
